title: phyllocephalum indicum
intro: Phyllocephalum indicum is a plant species known for its medicinal properties and is classified as a type of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The medicinal properties of Phyllocephalum indicum are attributed to its bioactive compounds, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and protecting against oxidative stress. Phyllocephalum indicum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
